mapper.sql: id, notice_id, receiver_id, receiver_role, read_status, read_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notification_receiver WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM notification_receiver WHERE receiver_role = #{receiverRole} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM notification_receiver WHERE read_status = #{readStatus} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM notification_receiver ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_receiver ( notice_id, receiver_id, receiver_role, read_status, read_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{noticeId}, #{receiverId}, #{receiverRole}, #{readStatus}, #{readTime}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO notification_receiver ( notice_id, receiver_id, receiver_role, read_status, read_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.noticeId}, #{item.receiverId}, #{item.receiverRole}, #{item.readStatus}, #{item.readTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE notification_receiver
notice_id = #{noticeId},
receiver_id = #{receiverId},
receiver_role = #{receiverRole},
read_status = #{readStatus},
read_time = #{readTime},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_receiver WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND read_status = 'UNREAD'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_receiver WHERE receiver_role = #{receiverRole} AND read_status = 'UNREAD'
mapper.update:
UPDATE notification_receiver SET read_status = 'READ', read_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE notification_receiver SET read_status = 'READ', read_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND read_status = 'UNREAD'
